title: Primer
description: The Primer's ordered term list (content/primer.json): {generated_at, terms[]}. `terms` is a fixed, dependency-ordered list of lexicon slugs (lowercase-hyphenated, matching each lexicon entry's term run through the term -> slug transform in site/builders/primer.py) -- e.g. a newcomer must meet 'foundation-model' before 'fine-tuning' makes sense, so order is load-bearing, not incidental. Phase 3 seeds this file with the 10-slug on-ramp; site/builders/primer.py renders it as the /primer/ page.

generated_at.description: Calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD) this primer's term list was last generated/reviewed.

terms.description: Dependency-ordered lexicon slugs (lowercase-hyphenated), each resolvable to a content/lexicon.json entry, rendered in this order by site/builders/primer.py.
